component.name: Aether Forge
component.summary: Native Rust-powered IDE for the Aether programming language

description.p: Aether Forge is a fast, lightweight IDE built with Tauri 2.0 and Rust. It includes the Scrible AI agent powered by StarCoder2-3B for intelligent code completions, explanations, and fixes.
Features: syntax highlighting, file explorer, integrated terminal, AI chat assistant, and Flatpak sandboxing.
Initial release of Aether Forge IDE.
